structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling State Temperature and Damper Control
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop resets the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint; hot duct damper closed. If cold duct supply air temperature > room temperature, active cold duct airflow setpoint is capped at minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Activate cold duct damper control with setpoint range min to max; close hot duct damper; limit setpoint to minimum if cold SAT > room temp.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. When the Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.
1. If cold duct supply air temperature from air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
judge_reason: Evidence quote is only section heading, no operational details to support summary.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating State Temperature and Damper Control
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.14 Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Cold-Duct Minimum Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is heating: 1) Heating Loop resets active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint; hot duct damper modulates to maintain measured hot duct airflow. 2) Active cold duct airflow setpoint set to minimum endpoint; cooling damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow. 3) If hot duct supply air temperature < room temperature, hot duct damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Operate hot duct at modulated setpoint from 0 to Vheat-max; operate cold duct at minimum; override hot duct closed if hot SAT < room temp.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
c. When the Zone State is heating:
1. The Heating Loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint.
2. The active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cooling damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at active cold duct airflow setpoint.
3. If hot duct supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed.

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
judge_reason: Evidence quote is only section heading, no operational details.
